lingala.highlighted_phrases_are_potential_red_: 🚩 Maloba oyo elakisami ezali bilembo ya bokebisi oyo ekoki kozala (bokanisi kaka, ekateli te)—
lingala.welcome_to_the_ai_literacy_lab: Boyei bolamu na Laboratware ya Boyebi AI
lingala.this_is_a_six_section_lab_about_how_ai: Oyo ezali laboratware ya biteni motoba na ntina ya ndenge AI esalaka mpenza, epai ekweaka, mpe ndenge ya kosalela yango kozanga kotika yango esala makanisi oyo osengeli komeka.
lingala.six_sections_no_order_required_revisit: Biteni motoba, molɔngɔ ezali na ntina te. Zongela nyonso. Bokoli na yo ebombamaka.
lingala.press_1_6_to_jump_sections_for_all_sho: Finá 1–6 mpo na kopumbwa biteni, ? mpo na banzela nyonso ya mokuse, T mpo na banoti ya molakisi.
lingala.click_any_underlined_term: Finá liloba nyonso oyo etyami molɔngɔ na nse
lingala.glossary_definitions_pop_up_inline_the: Ndimbola ya diksionɛrɛ ebimaka na kati ya molɔngɔ. Diksionɛrɛ mobimba ezali na mosika ya butɔ moko na banɛrɛ.
lingala.the_live_demos_here_use_google_gemini_: Bilakiseli ya bomoi awa esalelaka Google Gemini. Kotya te bankombo, banimero ya telefone to eloko ya sekele — bitindeli ekoki kobombama na moto oyo apesaka AI.
lingala.see_tokens_next_token_prediction_and_t: Talá token, bosakoli ya token oyo elandi, mpe molunge kosala.
lingala.2_why_llms_get_things_wrong: 2. Mpo na nini LLM esalaka mabe
lingala.a_gallery_of_real_feeling_ai_mistakes_: Ndako ya mabe ya AI oyo emonanaka ya solo, elongo na ndenge mokomoko ekosaka bato.
lingala.weak_vs_strong_prompts_five_patterns_a: Bitindeli ya bolɛmbu na oyo ya makasi, bandakisa mitano, mpe bozongeli ya bomoi.
lingala.12_phrases_identify_the_role_of_each_p: Maloba 12. Mpo na mokomoko, poná mokumba oyo esalaka (moto / mosala / lisolo / lolenge / ndakisa / ndelo).
lingala.click_the_wrong_parts_of_an_ai_generat: Finá biteni ya mabe ya makomi oyo AI esali.
lingala.scaffold_vs_substitute_a_udl_framed_de: Lisungi na esika — esaleli ya bopɔni oyo etongami na UDL. Yaká na likambo na yo.
lingala.one_page_printable_summary_of_the_whol: Bokuse ya lokasa moko oyo ekoki kobima ya laboratware mobimba.
lingala.this_clears_which_sections_you_ve_visi: Oyo elongolaka biteni oyo otalaki, bozongeli ya bitindeli oyo obombaki, mpe makanisi na yo ya UDL. XP oyo ozwaki na esika mosusu na AlloFlow ekobebisama te.
lingala.the_ai_in_alloflow_is_not_magic_it_is_: AI na AlloFlow ezali maji te — ezali mosakoli ya token oyo elandi oyo eteyami na makomi minene. Laboratware oyo elakisaka oyo esalaka mpenza, ntango ekweaka, mpe ndenge ya kosalela yango kozanga kotika yango esala makanisi oyo osengeli komeka.
lingala.toggle_clinical_rationale_panels_keybo: Lakisa/bomba bapanɛlɛ ya ntina ya monganga (klavier— T)
lingala.show_keyboard_shortcuts_keyboard: Lakisa banzela ya mokuse ya klavier (klavier— ?)
lingala.see_all_glossary_terms_in_one_place: Talá maloba nyonso ya diksionɛrɛ na esika moko
lingala.clear_your_progress_and_start_fresh: Longola bokoli na yo mpe banda ya sika
lingala.live_ai_calls_are_not_available_in_thi: Babengi ya AI ya bomoi ezali te na esika oyo. Bilakiseli ekosalela bandakisa oyo ebombamaki.
lingala.type_something_into_the_tokenizer_in_s: Koma eloko na kati ya mosali-token na eteni 1.
lingala.compare_outputs_at_different_temperatu: Kokanisa bibimeli na milunge ekeseni na eteni 1.
lingala.write_or_run_3_prompts_in_the_section_: Koma to salela bitindeli 3 na atelier ya eteni 3.
lingala.catch_every_error_in_a_section_4_passa: Kanga libunga nyonso na paragrafe ya eteni 4 kozanga bilembo.
lingala.work_through_all_7_preset_scenarios_in: Salá bikamwiseli nyonso 7 oyo etyami liboso na eteni 5.
lingala.pass_all_5_comprehension_checks_one_pe: Longa bomekoli nyonso 5 ya bososoli (moko mpo na eteni ya lisolo moko).
lingala.visit_every_section_including_the_quic: Talá eteni nyonso, elongo na referanse ya nokinoki.
lingala.stuff_you_may_have_picked_up_that_is_n: — makambo oyo mbala mosusu oyekaki oyo ezali solo mobimba te
lingala.about_the_ai_in_this_lab: Na ntina ya AI na laboratware oyo
lingala.powers_live_demos_here_it_is: epesaka nguya na bilakiseli ya bomoi awa. Ezali
lingala.llm_among_many_chatgpt_claude_and_othe: LLM moko kati na mingi — ChatGPT, Claude mpe misusu ezali, mpe mokomoko esalaka na ndenge ekeseni na botindeli moko.
lingala.they_don_t_know_events_after_it_ask_th: — bayebi te makambo oyo eleki nsima na yango. Tuná AI mbala moko na ntina ya ndelo na yango soki olingi koyeba mpo na mituna oyo esengeli ntango.
lingala.what_you_type_may_be_logged_by_the_ai_: Oyo okomaka ekoki kobombama na moto oyo apesaka AI.
lingala.names_phone_numbers_medical_info_or_an: bankombo, banimero ya telefone, ba-ensa ya monganga, to eloko nyonso oyo okokoma te na papye oyo mopaya akoki kotanga.
lingala.this_lab_is_about_text_ai_the_same_ide: Laboratware oyo ezali na ntina ya AI ya makomi. Makanisi ndenge moko esalelaka na...
lingala.they_hallucinate_hands_text_and_anatom: Bazwaka bimoni ya lokuta na ntina ya maboko, makomi, mpe botongami ya nzoto, ndenge bamodɛlɛ ya makomi ezwaka bimoni na ntina ya bosolo. Bokitisi na ba-ensa ya boteyi emonanaka na oyo bakomaka.
lingala.can_clone_voices_from_a_few_seconds_of: Ekoki kokopi mingongo uta na basegonde moke ya bozwi. Bikama ya bondimi mpe deepfake esalelaka.
lingala.newer_and_even_more_convincing_than_de: Ya sika mpe endimisaka mingi koleka deepfake ya kala. Kanisá ete videwo nyonso ya mokuse ekoki kozala oyo esalemi.
lingala.the_core_literacy_skills_check_sources: Mayele ya moboko ya boyebi — kotala bautu, koyeba ntango mongongo eyokani na bosolo te, kozwa mbano lokola motikeli kasi bosolo te — nyonso oyo ekendaka na oyo.
lingala.written_by_a_clinician_psyd_with_stude: Ekomami na monganga (PsyD) na kokanisa bana-kelasi oyo bazali na bokeseni na mosala ya boyangeli, bokebi, mpe boyekoli. Emekeli ya botali na eteni 5 ezali eteni oyo baprogramɛ mingi ya boyebi AI epumbwaka — mpe ezali oyo ya ntina koleka.
lingala.your_prompt_or_the_model_s_own_previou: Botindeli na yo to mbano ya kala ya modɛlɛ yango moko.
lingala.split_text_into_small_pieces_tokens_wo: Kabola makomi na biteni mike (token). Maloba, biteni ya maloba, bilembo ya kokata.
lingala.score_every_next_token: Pesá bapwɛ na token nyonso oyo elandi
lingala.assign_a_probability_to_every_possible: Pesá probabilité na token nyonso oyo elandi oyo ekoki.
lingala.temperature_picks_how_random_the_choic: Molunge eponaka ndenge boponi ezali kozanga molɔngɔ (talá esika ya lisano na nse).
lingala.add_the_new_token_feed_it_back_in_do_t: Bakisa token ya sika. Zongisa yango na kati. Salá oyo mbala nkama.
lingala.everything_an_llm_does_is_a_loop_of_th: Eloko nyonso oyo LLM esalaka ezali zingazinga ya matambe 5 oyo. Ezali «kokanisa» te — ezali boyokani ya ndakisa na token, mbala na mbala.
lingala.the_newly_sampled_token_becomes_part_o: Token ya sika oyo eponami ekomaka eteni ya kokota ya litambe oyo elandi. Fraze moko ya mbano ya AI ezali zingazinga nkama ndenge oyo.
lingala.text_sub_word_ids: Makomi → ID ya biteni ya maloba
lingala.how_far_from_the_top_pick: Mosika boni na boponi ya likolo
lingala.each_block_below_explores_one_of_these: Bloki mokomoko na nse eyekolaka moko ya matambe oyo. Finá chip nyonso mpo na kokende mbala moko.
lingala.an_llm_never_sees_words_it_sees: LLM emonaka «maloba» ata mokolo moko te — emonaka
lingala.which_are_pieces_of_words_type_a_sente: oyo ezali biteni ya maloba. Koma fraze moko mpe talá ndenge ekabolami.
lingala.the_dog_was_running_quickly_because_it: Mbwa ezalaki kokima nokinoki mpo esepelaki te.
lingala.i_had_pizza_and_ice_cream_at_the_park_: Naliaki pizza 🍕 mpe glasi 🍨 na parke 🏞️ lelo!
lingala.the_paleontologist_misidentified_the_p: Moyekoli ya bafosile ayebaki mabe nkoto ya lokuta lokola arthropod.
lingala.why_this_matters: Mpo na nini oyo ezali na ntina—
lingala.the_model_predicts_the_next_token_not_: Modɛlɛ esakolaka token oyo elandi, liloba oyo elandi te. Maloba ya mokuse oyo emonanaka mingi ekomaka token moko; maloba ya milai mbala mingi ekabolamaka (ndakisa Lingelesi "unhappy" → "un" + "happy"). Bofuti mpe esalaka ndenge oyo — motuya ya API etangamaka na token moko, na liloba moko te.
lingala.all_the_llm_is_really_doing_guessing_w: Nyonso oyo LLM ezali kosala mpenza: kokanisa token nini ekoya na sima. Soki opesi lisolo moko, ezali na probabilité mpo na token nyonso oyo elandi oyo ekoki.
lingala.controls_how_random_the_next_token_cho: etambwisaka ndenge boponi ya token oyo elandi ezali kozanga molɔngɔ. Moke (0.2) = pene na ntango nyonso eponaka token oyo ekoki koleka. Monene (1.2) = eponaka uta na mokila molai, elongo na token oyo ekoki te. Botindeli moko, milunge misato—
lingala.show_the_recorded_example_outputs_agai: Lakisa lisusu bibimeli ya ndakisa oyo ebombamaki
lingala.live_results_shown_above: ✅ Bambano ya bomoi elakisami na likolo
lingala.static_mode_recorded_examples_only: Molɔngɔ ya kotɛlɛma — bandakisa oyo ebombamaki kaka
lingala.low_temperature_is_right_for_facts_wha: Molunge ya nse ebongi na bosolo (" Engumba mokonzi ya Falanse ezali nini?"). Molunge ya likolo ebongi na mosala ya bokeli. Bisaleli mingi ya masolo ya AI etyaka na kati esika moko — yango wana mituna ya bosolo mbala mosusu ebungaka.
lingala.pick_any_temperature_and_any_prompt_ru: Poná molunge nyonso mpe botindeli nyonso. Salela yango na bomoi. Na sima salela botindeli moko na molunge ekeseni mpe kokanisa. Bakoli 5 ya nsuka etikalaka komonana mpo omona ndenge mbano ebongwanaka na butɔ.
lingala.live_ai_required_for_the_playground_th: AI ya bomoi esengeli mpo na esika ya lisano — bokokanisi 3 oyo etyami liboso na likolo esalelaka bandakisa oyo ebombamaki.
lingala.llms_don_t_know_what_they_don_t_know_t: LLM eyebi te oyo eyebi te. Ebimisaka token oyo elandi oyo eyokani lokola oyo ekoki kondimama koleka, ata ntango eyano oyo ekoki kondimama ezali mabe — oyo ebengami
lingala.here_are_seven_failure_modes_every_stu: ). Awa ezali balolenge sambo ya bokweyi oyo moyekoli nyonso asengeli koyeba.
lingala.the_date_its_training_data_ends_anythi: — mokolo oyo ba-ensa ya boteyi na yango esukaka. Eloko nyonso na sima na yango eyebani te, ata soki modɛlɛ ezali kokoba koloba na bondimeli. Tuná yango—
lingala.what_is_your_knowledge_cutoff_date: "Mokolo ya ndelo ya boyebi na yo ezali nini?"
lingala.if_the_question_is_about_something_tha: Soki motuna ezali na ntina ya eloko oyo ekoki kobongwana to esalemi kala mingi te, kondima eyano ya AI te kozanga liziba ya web ya bomoi. Okoki mpe kotuna modɛlɛ mbala moko ndelo na yango ezali nini — mbala mingi eyebaka.
lingala.why_hallucination_even_happens: Mpo na nini bimoni ya lokuta esalemaka ata moke
lingala.the_llm_doesn_t_have_a_truth_step_it_h: LLM ezali na litambe ya «bosolo» te. Ezali na litambe ya «bondimeli». Nzela moko kaka ebimisaka biyano ya solo mpe ya mabe nyonso mibale — na mongongo moko ya bondimeli.
lingala.could_be_about_anything: Ekoki kozala na ntina ya eloko nyonso.
lingala.plausible_text_generator: Mosali ya makomi oyo ekoki kondimama
lingala.picks_likely_next_tokens_has_no_fact_c: Eponaka token oyo elandi oyo ekoki. Botali ya bosolo ezali te.
lingala.the_pattern_was_common_in_training_dat: Ndakisa ezalaki mingi na ba-ensa ya boteyi yango wana modɛlɛ ebimisaki yango lisusu (koluka te — kaka bosakoli).
lingala.fact_wasn_t_present_or_the_pattern_loo: Bosolo ezalaki te, to ndakisa emonanaki malamu kasi ezalaki te.
lingala.both_paths_come_out_the_same_way_same_: Banzela nyonso mibale ebimaka ndenge moko — mongongo moko ya bondimeli, bafraze moko ya pɛtɛɛ. Nzela kaka ya kokabola yango ezali kotala na eloko libanda ya AI.
lingala.same_prompt_three_different_models_rea: Botindeli moko, bamodɛlɛ misato ekeseni. Tángá na bokebi — siansi ezali moko kasi mongongo, bolai, mpe bokebi ekeseni. Soki kelasi na yo emeki na modɛlɛ moko mpe moninga na yo na mosusu, bokozwa biyano ekeseni mpe nyonso mibale "malamu".
lingala.length_varies_by_10_words_one_model_le: Bolai ekeseni na maloba 10+. Modɛlɛ moko ebandaka na ndimbola, mosusu na litomba oyo emonanaka. Moko elobaka polele "bolai ya mbonge", mosusu "balangi". Moko te ezali malamu koleka — kasi soki olingi liloba ya sikisiki mpo na mosala, modɛlɛ oyo oponi ekozala na ntina.
lingala.recorded_examples_for_teaching_not_liv: Bandakisa oyo ebombamaki mpo na koteya, mobengeli ya bomoi te. Mibengeli ya bomoi awa esalelaka Gemini kaka.
lingala.send_this_exact_question_to_gemini_rig: Tinda motuna oyo ya sikisiki na Gemini sikoyo mpe talá nini ezongi
lingala.compare_the_live_answer_to_the_canned_: Kokanisa eyano ya bomoi na eyano oyo ebongisami liboso na likolo.
lingala.if_ai_confidence_tracked_correctness_t: Soki bondimeli ya AI elandaki bosolo, bandɔti na nse ekosala mokoloto ya ngɔmɔ.  Na esika ya yango, pene na eyano nyonso ya AI etangamaka lokola bondimeli ya likolo — malamu to mabe. Mongongo moko.
lingala.scatter_plot_ai_confidence_on_the_x_ax: Etanda ya bopanzani: bondimeli ya AI na axe x na bosolo na axe y. Biyano mingi esanganaka na bondimeli ya likolo kozanga kotala bosolo.
lingala.if_ai_confidence_tracked_truth_dots_wo: Soki bondimeli ya AI elandaki bosolo, bandɔti ekozala na molɔngɔ na mokoloto ya ngɔmɔ ya bandɔti.
lingala.in_the_bottom_right_are_the_danger_zon: na nse ya loboko ya mobali ezali zone ya likama: emonanaka ya solo, kasi na bosolo mabe.
lingala.look_identical_to_red_in_tone_that_s_t: emonanaka ndenge moko na motane na mongongo. Yango ezali likambo ya ntina ya liteya.
lingala.you_can_t_tell_which_is_which_from_ins: Okoki koloba te wapi ezali wapi uta na kati ya AI. Kaka botali ya libanda esalaka.
lingala.analyze_any_ai_output: Talá malamu mbano nyonso ya AI
lingala.paste_any_ai_generated_text_from_here_: Tya makomi nyonso oyo AI esali (uta awa, uta na chatbot mosusu, uta na lisolo oyo elobi AI ekomaki, bongo na bongo). Esaleli e
lingala.kinds_of_red_flags_so_you_can_see_wher: lakisaka balolenge ya bilembo ya bokebisi mpo omona wapi ya kotala. Mobengeli ya AI ezali te: oyo esalaka na esaleli na yo.
lingala.paste_an_ai_response_here_to_see_which: Tya eyano ya AI awa mpo omona maloba nini ebongi botali ya mibale...
lingala.paste_ai_output_for_red_flag_analysis: Tya mbano ya AI mpo na botali ya bilembo ya bokebisi
lingala.nothing_to_analyze_yet_paste_some_ai_g: Eloko ya kotala naino te. Tya makomi mosusu oyo AI esali na likolo mpo omona maloba nini ekoki kosɛnga botali.
lingala.clear_your_entire_prompt_journal: Longola zurunale na yo mobimba ya bitindeli?
lingala.this_removes_all_saved_prompts_from_th: Oyo elongolaka bitindeli nyonso oyo ebombamaki uta na eteni oyo. Okoki kozongisa te.
lingala.try_adding_i_am_a_9th_grader_studying_: Meká kobakisa— "Nazali moyekoli ya kelasi 9 oyo azali koyekola mpo na..." — yebisa AI eloko na ntina na yo.
lingala.try_adding_a_don_t_don_t_write_the_who: Bakisa bopekisi— "Koma mokanda mobimba mpo na ngai te." Bandelo epekisaka bambano ezanga ntina.
lingala.try_adding_a_format_give_me_a_3_step_l: Bakisa lolenge— "Pesá ngai liste ya matambe 3" to "fraze moko kaka" — etambwisaka ndenge eyano ezali na ntina.
lingala.try_adding_a_sample_here_s_one_i_did_e: Bakisa ndakisa— "Awa ezali moko oyo nasalaki— [ndakisa]. Salá oyo elandi na lolenge moko."
lingala.a_weak_prompt_gives_you_a_shallow_answ: Botindeli ya bolɛmbu epesaka yo eyano ya libanda nokinoki. Botindeli ya makasi epesaka yo eyano ya ntina nokinoki ndenge moko. Bokeseni ezali mayele — mpe ekoki koyekolama malamu mpenza.
lingala.here_is_one_strong_prompt_with_every_p: Awa ezali botindeli moko ya makasi na ndakisa nyonso etyami langi. Tya kursɛrɛ na liloba nyonso mpo omona ndakisa nini ezali.
lingala.copy_to_use_in_your_own_ai_tool: Kopi mpo na kosalela na esaleli na yo ya AI
lingala.pick_a_task_fill_in_the_blanks_you_ll_: Poná mosala. Tondisa bisika mpamba. Okozwa botindeli oyo esalelaka bandakisa nyonso mitano — kozanga kokanela yango.
lingala.load_into_the_workshop_below_to_run_it: Tya na atelier na nse mpo na kosalela yango na bomoi to kozongela lisusu
lingala.load_this_prompt_into_the_workshop_bel: Tya botindeli oyo na atelier na nse mpo osalela yango na Gemini
lingala.copy_this_prompt_to_try_in_your_own_ai: Kopi botindeli oyo mpo na komeka na esaleli na yo ya AI
lingala.run_both_prompts_at_the_same_time_and_: Salela bitindeli nyonso mibale ntango moko mpe kokanisa oyo Gemini esali
lingala.your_turn_iterate_a_prompt_live: Ngala na yo: zongela botindeli na bomoi
lingala.write_a_prompt_below_run_it_look_at_th: Koma botindeli na nse. Salela yango. Talá mbano. Bongola botindeli na kosalela bandakisa mitano. Salela lisusu. Ozali koluka kosala mbano ezala malamu koleka — to koyeba mpo na nini mbano ezali na lolenge wana.
lingala.try_explain_why_the_ocean_is_salty_to_: Meká: "Limbolá mpo na nini mbu ezali mungwa na moyekoli ya kelasi 7 oyo alingi koyeba oyo asili koyeba atome ezali nini. Koleka bafraze 4 te."
lingala.check_which_of_the_five_patterns_your_: Talá bandakisa mitano nini botindeli na yo esalelaka (mobengeli ya AI ezali te)
lingala.copy_your_prompt_to_use_elsewhere: Kopi botindeli na yo mpo na kosalela na esika mosusu
lingala.save_this_prompt_to_your_journal_for_l: Bomba botindeli oyo na zurunale na yo mpo na sima
lingala.live_ai_unavailable_the_critique_still: AI ya bomoi ezali te — bopalangi ezali kosala kaka.
lingala.this_critique_uses_keyword_heuristics_: Bopalangi oyo esalelaka bokanisi ya maloba ya ntina, AI te. Ekoki kobungisa maloba ya bokeli. Salela yango lokola liste ya botali, bapwɛ te.
lingala.nothing_saved_yet_every_successful_liv: Eloko ebombami naino te. Bokoli nyonso ya bomoi oyo elongi ebombamaka awa yango moko. Okoki mpe ⭐ kobomba botindeli kozanga kosalela yango.
lingala.save_your_journal_as_a_markdown_file: Bomba zurunale na yo lokola fisye Markdown
lingala.the_audience_is_parents_who_don_t_have: Bayoki bazali baboti oyo bazali na moboko ya siansi te.
lingala.output_as_3_bullet_points_max_20_words: Bimisa lokola bapwɛ 3, mokomoko maloba 20 na koleka.
lingala.for_instance_photosynthesis_is_how_pla: Na ndakisa: "Photosynthesis ezali ndenge banzete elyaka mwinda ya moi."
lingala.pretend_you_are_an_admissions_officer_: Salá lokola ozali mokambi ya boyingeli na eteyelo ya likolo ya moke ya bosaleli ya bonsomi.
lingala.use_a_warm_but_professional_tone: Salela mongongo ya molunge kasi ya mosala.
lingala.the_parent_emailed_yesterday_asking_wh: Moboti atindaki imɛlɛ lobi na kotuna mpo na nini mwana na bango azali na liste ya bokengeli bizaleli.
lingala.format_subject_line_2_paragraph_body_s: Lolenge: molɔngɔ ya likambo, nzoto ya baparagrafe 2, bosukisi.
lingala.example_output_your_essay_shows_strong: Ndakisa ya mbano: "Mokanda na yo elakisi mongongo ya makasi kasi ezangi botongami. Meká…"
lingala.write_a_follow_up_email_to_the_parent: Koma imɛlɛ ya bolandi na moboti.
lingala.you_will_see_12_phrases_pulled_from_re: Okomona maloba 12 oyo ebimisami uta na bitindeli ya solo. Mpo na mokomoko, poná mokumba ya botongami motoba nini liloba esalaka — moto, mosala, lisolo, lolenge, ndakisa to ndelo. Emekaka soki okoki *kotala malamu* botindeli lokola eloko na esika ya kokoma to kotanga yango kaka.
lingala.reveal_one_error_using_any_hints_forfe: Lakisa libunga moko. Kosalela elembo nyonso ebungisaka bonus ya bapwɛ mobimba — kasi esungaka soki okangami.
lingala.hints_used_perfect_bonus_forfeited_on_: Bilembo esalelami — bonus mobimba ebungaki na komeka oyo. Zongisa mpe meká lisusu kozanga bilembo mpo ozwa yango.
lingala.why_each_error_was_plausible: Mpo na nini libunga mokomoko ekokaki kondimama
lingala.write_your_own_trap_passage: Koma paragrafe na yo ya motambo
lingala.pick_a_topic_you_know_well_write_a_sho: Poná likambo oyo oyebi malamu. Koma paragrafe ya mokuse ya lolenge AI na ntina na yango, kasi zinga maloba 2–3 ya mabe na kati ya bakrošé mibale, ndenge oyo
lingala.trade_passages_with_someone_else_whoev: . Bongola baparagrafe na moto mosusu — moto oyo akangi mabunga nyonso na kati ya bakrošé alongaka.
lingala.your_draft_use_brackets_to_mark_errors: Motikeli na yo (salela [[bakrošé]] mpo na kotya elembo na mabunga)
lingala.e_g_mitosis_has_four_main_phases_proph: Ndakisa "Mitose ezali na biteni minei ya minene: prophase, metaphase, [[telophase]], mpe anaphase. Na tango ya metaphase bakromozome etyamaka [[na pembeni ya enveloppe ya noyau]] liboso ekabwana."
lingala.write_your_trap_passage: Koma paragrafe na yo ya motambo
lingala.good_trap_passages_have_2_3_seeded_err: Baparagrafe ya motambo ya malamu ezali na mabunga 2–3 oyo elonami. Koleka wana emonanaka bosembo te, na se pɛtɛɛ mingi. Bɛtɛlisa mabunga oyo emonanaka ekoki kondimama na botangi ya liboso.
lingala.the_barrier_you_described_sounds_mecha: Mokakatano oyo olimboli emonanaka lokola ya mekanike (kokoma malɛmbɛ, kokanisa uta na memware, kobongisa, kobongisa molɔngɔ). Kosalela AI mpo na kolongola mokakatano wana ezali lokola kosala AI esala mayele yango moko te. Kende liboso — kasi bomba makanisi ya moboko na loboko na yo.
lingala.the_barrier_is_cognitive_and_the_skill: Mokakatano ezali ya mayele mpe mayele oyo opesaki nkombo ezali lolenge ya mayele oyo eteyelo ezali koluka kotonga (kokanisa, kosala, kopesa ntina). Kosala AI esala oyo elakisi ozali kopumbwa boteyi. Kanisá: AI ekoki koteya yo na mayele na esika ya kosala yango mpo na yo? Yango ezongisaka yango na lisungi.
lingala.the_barrier_is_cognitive_but_the_skill: Mokakatano ezali ya mayele kasi mayele oyo olimboli ekoki kozala oyo eteyami awa te. Tángá lisusu mosala: emekaka mayele nini ya sikisiki mpenza? Salela AI mpo na kokitisa mokakatano na mayele wana ya sikisiki, mpo na kobongola yango te.
lingala.the_question_is_not_is_ai_good_or_bad_: Motuna ezali te "AI ezali malamu to mabe" — kasi "AI ezali kolongola mokakatano na mayele oyo nazali kosala, to ezali kobongola mayele yango moko?"
lingala.before_you_use_ai_for_something_run_it: Liboso osalela AI mpo na eloko, salela yango na mituna oyo mibale. Biyano ememaka na moko ya bambano misato.
lingala.what_specific_skill_is_this_task_meant: Mayele nini ya sikisiki mosala oyo esalema mpo na kotonga?
lingala.is_ai_removing_a_barrier_to_that_skill: AI ezali kolongola mokakatano na mayele wana, to ezali kosala mayele yango moko?
lingala.removes_barrier_go_ahead_keep_the_core: Elongolaka mokakatano. Kende liboso — bomba makanisi ya moboko na loboko na yo.
lingala.can_ai_coach_you_through_the_skill_ins: AI ekoki koteya yo na mayele na esika ya kosala yango? Soki iyo — bongola yango lokola lisungi.
lingala.doing_the_skill_itself_skipping_ai_her: Kosala mayele yango moko. Kopumbwa AI awa ebombaka boteyi oyo osengeli.
lingala.use_ai_in_a_way_that_helps_you_do_the_: Salela AI na lolenge oyo esungaka yo kosala mosala yo moko.
lingala.use_ai_to_do_the_work_for_you: Salela AI mpo esala mosala mpo na yo.
lingala.now_compare_both_worked_versions_there: . Sikoyo kokanisa bankoma nyonso mibale oyo esalemi — bopɔni ya "mabe" ezali te, kaka bokanisi ya polele koleka na ntina ya mayele ezali mpenza nini.
lingala.why_this_one_matters: 🔬 Mpo na nini oyo ezali na ntina
lingala.the_five_scenarios_above_are_common_bu: Bikamwiseli mitano na likolo ezali mingi kasi motuna ya solo ntango nyonso ezali na ntina ya ntango na yo ya sikisiki. Limbolá likambo na yo, pesá mayele nkombo, mpe pesá mokakatano nkombo. Okozwa nzela — eyano te.
lingala.e_g_i_have_a_biology_lab_report_due_fr: Ndakisa "Nazali na lapolo ya laboratware ya biologi oyo esengeli kopesa mokolo ya mitano mpe nakoki kotya likebi mpo na ntango molai te mpo na kokoma ebandeli."
lingala.e_g_writing_a_scientific_intro_that_st: Ndakisa "Kokoma ebandeli ya siansi oyo elobaka hypothèse"
lingala.name_the_skill_this_assignment_is_prac: Pesá nkombo na mayele oyo mosala oyo eteyaka
lingala.3_what_kind_of_barrier_is_in_the_way: 3. Lolenge nini ya mokakatano ezali na nzela?
lingala.heuristic_direction_no_ai_call: Nzela ya bokanisi (mobengeli ya AI te)
lingala.live_ai_unavailable_here_the_heuristic: AI ya bomoi ezali te awa — nzela ya bokanisi na likolo esalelaka biyano na yo kaka, mobengeli ya AI te.
lingala.to_print_other_ui_hides_automatically: mpo na kobimisa; UI mosusu ebombamaka yango moko.
lingala.download_a_markdown_report_of_your_pro: Zwá lapolo ya Markdown ya bokoli na yo, botali oyo olongaki, mpe bitindeli oyo obombaki. Pesá molakisi.
lingala.ai_literacy_lab_quick_reference: Laboratware ya Boyebi AI — Referanse ya nokinoki
lingala.alloflow_for_students_grades_6_12_clin: AlloFlow · Mpo na bayekoli ya kelasi 6–12 · Monganga akomaki
lingala.predicts_the_next_token_by_probability: Esakolaka token oyo elandi na probabilité
lingala.controls_how_random_the_pick_is: etambwisaka ndenge boponi ezali kozanga molɔngɔ
lingala.it_has_no_idea_what_s_true_only_what_s: Ezali na likanisi te ya oyo ezali "solo" — kaka oyo ekoki kondimama
lingala.fake_citations_verify_with_google_scho: Batatoli ya lokuta (talá na Google Scholar)
lingala.fills_gaps_with_plausible_stories: : etondisaka mibembo na masapo oyo ekoki kondimama
lingala.it_sounds_confident_exactly_the_same_w: Eyokani na bondimeli ndenge moko mpenza, ezala malamu to mabe
lingala.does_the_answer_cite_anything_verify_e: Eyano etatoli eloko? Talá litatoli mokomoko.
lingala.is_it_past_the_model_s_cutoff_use_web_: Eleki ndelo ya modɛlɛ? Salela boluki ya web soki iyo.
lingala.any_math_redo_it_with_a_calculator: Matematiki nyonso? Salá lisusu na kalkilatɛrɛ.
lingala.sound_too_confident_ask_are_you_sure_w: Eyokani na bondimeli mingi? Tuná "Ozali na ntembe te?" — talá soki eyano ebongwani.
lingala.ai_removes_a_barrier_so_you_can_do_the: AI elongolaka mokakatano mpo okoka kosala mayele. (Meká ngai. Bongisa makanisi na ngai. Tuná ngai mituna.)
lingala.ai_does_the_skill_for_you_write_my_ess: AI esalaka mayele mpo na yo. (Koma mokanda na ngai. Silisa mokakatano na ngai. Kutisa na esika ya kotanga.)
lingala.ask_what_skill_is_this_assignment_real: Tuná: "Mayele nini mosala oyo emekaka mpenza?" Na sima bomba yango na loboko na yo.
lingala.i_am_a_grade_student_don_t_solve_this_: "Nazali moyekoli ya kelasi [kelasi]. Kosilisa oyo mpo na ngai te — tuná ngai mituna oyo esungaka ngai kozwa eyano."
lingala.quiz_me_on_topic_one_question_at_a_tim: "Meká ngai na [likambo] motuna moko na ntango. Zela eyano na ngai liboso otuna oyo elandi."
lingala.are_you_certain_this_event_actually_ha: "Ozali na ntembe te ete likambo oyo esalemaki mpenza? Tatolá liziba."
lingala.explain_concept_using_only_middle_scho: "Limbolá [likanisi] na kosalela kaka maloba ya eteyelo ya katikati. Maloba ya tekiniki te."
lingala.alloflow_ai_literacy_lab_built_for_stu: AlloFlow · Laboratware ya Boyebi AI · Etongami mpo na bayekoli oyo basɛngaka AI lokola lisungi, esika te.
lingala.back_to_ai_literacy_lab_home: Zonga na ndako ya Laboratware ya Boyebi AI
lingala.2_why_llms_get_things_wrong_2: 2. Mpo na nini LLM esalaka mabe
lingala.pick_another_answer_to_try_again: Poná eyano mosusu mpo na komeka lisusu.
lingala.low_stakes_high_familiarity_high_sourc: Likama ya moke, boyebi ya likolo, ebongiseli ya liziba ya likolo. Botali ya kaka ezali kaka momesano malamu kasi okoki kondima mbano.
lingala.trust_most_of_it_but_check_one_or_two_: Ndima mingi na yango, kasi talá elobeli moko to mibale ya ntina na liziba ya bokonzi liboso osala.
lingala.treat_as_draft_every_concrete_claim_nu: Zwá lokola motikeli. Elobeli nyonso ya solo (motango, nkombo, litatoli) esɛngaka botali ya bomoko.
lingala.high_stakes_or_low_source_quality_use_: Likama ya likolo to ebongiseli ya liziba ya nse. Salela kaka mpo na kokanisa; kolakisa mbano ya AI lokola eyano ya nsuka te.
lingala.medical_diagnosis_legal_advice_citing_: Botali ya bokono, toli ya mibeko, kotatola baziba ya liboso oyo okoki kotala te — esaleli ya mabe mpo na mosala. Salela moto ya mayele to liziba ya bokonzi.
lingala.trust_calibration_how_much_should_i_tr: 🔬 Bokakemi ya bondimeli — nandima mbano oyo boni?
lingala.set_task_familiarity_stakes_source_qua: Tya boyebi ya mosala, likama, ebongiseli ya liziba, mpe bondimeli oyo modɛlɛ elobaki. Kanisá esika bonene ya bondimeli ekweaka. Bapwɛ te, bolakisi te.
lingala.green_red_safer_to_use: Mai ya pondu > motane = kimya mpo na kosalela
lingala.your_hypothesis_which_slider_should_we: Hypothèse na yo (sɛlisɛ nini esengeli kozala na kilo koleka na bonene? Bondimeli oyo elobami ezali na ntina awa?)
lingala.e_g_stakes_should_dominate_everything_: Ndakisa, likama esengeli kokonza nyonso — na bondimeli kasi mabe na likama ya moke < na ntembe kasi malamu na likama ya likolo...
lingala.open_questions_no_answer_key: Mituna ya polele (fungola ya eyano te)
lingala.why_does_your_familiarity_matter_what_: Mpo na nini boyebi na yo ezali na ntina? Nini modɛlɛ ekoki koyeba te oyo yo okoki koyeba?
lingala.when_llms_report_95_confidence_what_do: Ntango LLM elobaka bondimeli 95%, elakisi mpenza nini? Ekakemi?
lingala.when_should_you_never_use_an_llm_regar: Ntango nini osengeli kosalela LLM ata mokolo moko te ata soki ebongiseli ya liziba ezali ndenge nini?
lingala.how_would_your_trust_threshold_differ_: Ndenge nini ndelo na yo ya bondimeli ekokesana mpo na bomonisi ya matematiki na mokanda ya bokeli na litatoli?
lingala.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_yie: Nakoki kolimbola mpo na nini bosangani oyo epesaka ezaleli oyo ya bondimeli.
lingala.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget ya bolukiluki — bapwɛ te, bolakisi te, bopesi eyano te. Formule ya bondimeli ezali bokanisi, molɔngɔ oyo ebimisami te. LLM ekakemi malamu te — bondimeli oyo elobami mbala mingi ekeseni na bosikisiki. Talá bambano ya likama ya likolo ntango nyonso na baziba ya bokonzi.
lingala.ai_literacy_lab_main_content: Lisolo ya ntina ya Laboratware ya Boyebi AI
lingala.something_went_wrong_rendering_this_se: Eloko ebebaki na kolakisa eteni oyo. Talá console mpo na basango.
